---
title: "Intro to Neural Network"
source: "Lecture Material"
author: "Dr. Fuijan Yan"
institution: "Wichita State University"
competency: "Model Building"
tech-lang:
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This module introduces neural networks, and how to design neural networks to solve problems like classification and prediction.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/kstate_yan_neuralnetwork)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en)
